/usr/bin/c++ "CMakeFiles/syswatch-cpp.dir/src/main.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/syswatch-cpp.dir/src/system_monitor.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/syswatch-cpp.dir/src/cpu_monitor.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/syswatch-cpp.dir/src/memory_monitor.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/syswatch-cpp.dir/src/disk_monitor.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/syswatch-cpp.dir/src/network_monitor.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/syswatch-cpp.dir/src/logger.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/syswatch-cpp.dir/src/alert_engine.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/syswatch-cpp.dir/src/process_monitor.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/syswatch-cpp.dir/src/utils.cpp.o" -o syswatch-cpp
